aka: 制作《生命的进化》：大卫·爱登堡最伟大的冒险

cast.name: 理查德·阿滕伯勒 Richard Attenborough

director.name: 维多利亚·博宾 Victoria Bobin

this_title: Making Life on Earth: Attenborough's Greatest Adventure
trans_title: 制作《地球上的生命》：大卫·爱登堡最伟大的冒险
制作《生命的进化》：大卫·爱登堡最伟大的冒险
introduction: "It was one of the most privileged moments of my life."Celebrating 50 years of the series that opened our eyes to the natural world like never before 💚🌎🌍🌏Making Life on Earth: Attenborough’s Greatest Adventure is the remarkable story behind one of the BBC’s most famous wildlife blockbusters, featuring exclusive interviews with David Attenborough and the original production team.
